FLOOR PLANS

STUDIO, 1 & 2 BEDROOM APARTMENTS

At Pleasant Valley Apartments, we know how important it is for your home to fit you. Our apartments come in a variety of layouts, so you can pick the floor plan that works best for you. Additionally, every residence comes standard with perks like a private outdoor space and Asian-plank flooring. Whether you’re cuddling with your pet, hosting a dinner or game night with friends, or just relaxing after a long day, Pleasant Valley Apartments is the perfect place for you.

EVERYTHING YOU NEED IS HERE

No matter which floor plan you choose at Pleasant Valley Apartments, enjoy a tastefully styled, brightly lit home with plenty of space in a comfortable suburban setting.

Every day, appreciate your new home’s features that just make life easier, like an in-home washer and dryer, a private outdoor space, and upgraded finishes throughout.

This is where you want to be in Groton, Connecticut.

1-BEDROOM, 1-BATH

See 3D Tour
See Video Tour

1-Bedroom, 1-Bath
(608 sq. ft.) - $1,925/month

Property Description

 

Welcome to Chester Place, a newly and fully renovated pet-friendly community offering modern luxury living. The Chester Place is comprised of 6 two-story buildings featuring one-bedroom apartments. 

​

Each apartment is designed with an open-concept floor plan and contemporary finishes, including stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, shaker-style kitchen cabinets, engineered hardwood flooring, and recessed lighting. Enjoy the convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer and in-wall A/C units. Ample outdoor lighting and a security system have been added to enhance safety. 

​

Chester Place is a convenient five-minute commute to local employers and just 2 miles from Interstate 95. As part of our comprehensive living experience, the monthly community fee of $99 covers essential services such as full-service WiFi, trash removal, Renters Insurance, Resident reward program, and credit building to make it easier to manage your monthly expenses.

​

Our attentive, full-time on-site team and convenient online resident portal ensure that maintenance requests are handled promptly and effectively, with the added convenience of easy online payments.

​

We hope to have you join us soon!

Property Details
Contact:

Martha

(Property Manager)

martha@b7properties.com

(860) 400-2050

​

Community Fee:

Includes WiFi, Security Deposit, Water, Sewer, Trash Removal, Renters Insurance, Resident Rewards Program & Credit Building 

Features:

Pet Fees:

Registration Fee: $250

Dog Fee: $40/month

Cat Fee: $30/month

Up-Front Costs:

First Month's Rent & Fees, No up-front deposit, & Proof of utilities required before move-in

1-Bedroom, 1-Bath Corner
(738 sq. ft.) - $1,995/month

Property Description

Welcome to Emerson Place, a newly and fully renovated pet-friendly community offering modern luxury. Emerson Place is comprised of three two-story buildings featuring one and two-bedroom apartments, as well as outdoor amenities such as a pet play area and a community grilling and patio area. 

 

Each apartment is designed with an open-concept floor plan and contemporary finishes, including stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, shaker-style kitchen cabinets, engineered hardwood flooring, and recessed lighting. Enjoy the convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer and an in-wall A/C unit. Ample outdoor lighting and a security system have been added to enhance safety. 

 

Emerson Place is conveniently located just 2 miles from Interstate 95 and downtown Groton. As part of our comprehensive living experience, the monthly community fee of $99 covers essential services such as full-service WiFi, trash removal, Renters Insurance, Resident reward program, and credit building to make it easier to manage your monthly expenses.

 

Our attentive, full-time on-site team and convenient online resident portal ensure that maintenance requests are handled promptly and effectively, with the added convenience of easy online payments.

 

We hope to have you join us soon!
